node_count.notes: 8 nodes (A, B, C, D, E, F, G, ABSENT) — at the upper bound of 3–8 range.

findings: All nodes map directly to corpus sections: §5.2 (next-token prediction loop: B, C, D, E), §5.2/§5.5 (absent truth check: ABSENT), §5.3 (no uncertainty signal: G), §5.6 (fluent output: F). No RAG, RLHF, grounding, or mitigation nodes introduced.

absent_concept_visual.notes: ABSENT node uses 'absent' classDef: fill:#E8E8E8, stroke:#999, color:#666, stroke-dasharray:5 5 — visually distinct grey dashed-border node. Connected to the prediction loop via a dashed edge (-.->) labeled 'missing step', making the absence structurally explicit in the graph.

flow_clarity.notes: LR pipeline flows left-to-right. Prediction loop is explicit: E -- 'No — add token and continue' --> C. Exit path labeled 'Yes' leads to output nodes. Dashed missing-step edge to ABSENT does not interrupt the main pipeline readability.

palette_applied.notes: All 5 classDef classes used: input (A), process (B,C,D,E), absent (ABSENT), output (F), warn (G). No unclassified nodes.

png_status: skipped — mmdc not available in this environment; diagram.mmd is the primary deliverable
